layout.sidebar: Collapsible sidebar on the left. Must contain: Dashboard, Hierarquia de Plantas, Máquinas, Biblioteca de Defeitos, Diagnósticos. Background dark (#0F172A) with white text.
layout.header: Sticky top header with breadcrumbs, user profile (email/Google), and global search. border-b bg-white.

pages.name: Login
pages.description: Email/password and Google login. Split screen with industrial hero image on one side.

pages.name: Dashboard Executivo
pages.description: Dense KPI grid. Status distribution (OK, A1, A2, Parado) pie/bar charts. Monthly evolution line chart. Main defects list. Health index gauge. Failure probability ranking.

pages.name: Hierarquia de Plantas
pages.description: Tree or cascading table view: Empresa -> Unidade -> Área -> Equipamento -> Subconjunto -> Pontos. Option to import Excel.

pages.name: Cadastro de Máquinas
pages.description: Data table with search. Columns: TAG, fabricante, RPM, potência, criticidade, status. Option to import Excel list.

pages.name: Análise e Termografia
pages.description: Lists for 'Análise de Vibração' and 'Termografia'. Visual cards showing status of each point/machine.

pages.name: Biblioteca de Defeitos
pages.description: Catalog of defects (desbalanceamento, desalinhamento, rolamentos BPFO/BPFI/BSF, cavitação, folga, barra quebrada). Table showing symptoms, frequencies, causes, actions, and alarm status toggle.

pages.name: Diagnóstico (3 Colunas)
pages.description: 3-column interactive layout: Col 1: Select defect -> Col 2: Auto-fills diagnosis/cause/consequence/recommendation -> Col 3: Technician edits and saves.

components.status_badge: Small rectangular badge, rounded-sm, px-2 py-0.5, text-xs font-bold. Color maps to status.
components.data_table: Dense rows (py-2), clear column headers. Hover state on rows (bg-slate-50).
components.charts: Shadcn/Recharts. Use structural gray for axes, primary/status colors for data lines/bars.
components.forms: Use Shadcn UI forms. Clear labels, dense inputs (h-9).

login_hero.description: Modern industrial machine inside a factory, used for the login split-screen background.

empty_state_illustration.description: Blue industrial robot arm in factory, used for empty states or dashboard banners.

testing_requirements.data_testid: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links, tabs) MUST include a data-testid attribute formatted in kebab-case based on their role (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button', data-testid='sidebar-toggle').

technical_notes.file_extensions: Use .js and .jsx files. Do not use .tsx or TypeScript.
